task_text: O8 — Generic API-to-screen data source: new widget data source 'generic-api' that polls an HTTP endpoint, applies SSRF guard, parses JSON, plucks fields via simple dot-path config, returns to template renderer. Mirrors RssDataSource shape. XML and CSV deferred to follow-up. Audit ref P0 #3.
verdict: Lean cut for O8: one new data source class implementing WidgetDataSource, registered in DataSourceRegistryService. Mirrors RssDataSource's SSRF guard + circuit breaker + AbortController timeout pattern exactly. JSON-only for v1. All within existing widget infrastructure; no schema change, no migration, no new module.
